title: Trimble Connect Project Structure
description: Structure documentation for Trimble Connect project entities used in construction BIM collaboration

structure.name: string — Project name (required)
structure.status: string enum — Project lifecycle state: ACTIVE | ARCHIVED | DELETED
structure.type: string enum — Project domain: CONSTRUCTION | INFRASTRUCTURE | ENGINEERING | OTHER
structure.location: string — Physical location description (city, address, or region)
structure.createdBy: string — User ID of the project creator
structure.thumbnail: string (URI) — URL of the project thumbnail image
structure.memberCount: integer — Number of team members with project access
structure.fileCount: integer — Number of files stored in the project

statusValues.ACTIVE: Project is ongoing and accessible to members
statusValues.ARCHIVED: Project is read-only and closed to new activity
statusValues.DELETED: Project has been soft-deleted (recoverable by admin)

notes: id is a UUID v4 format assigned by Trimble Connect at project creation
Projects with ACTIVE status are visible in project list views
Deleted projects can be recovered by workspace administrators within 30 days
fileCount includes all versions of versioned files (not unique filenames)
